code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws_at(s, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect_dedup(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  for x in xs
    if not removed and x == target
      removed = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted_out: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      sorted_out = list.push(sorted_out, m)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  sorted_out
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one_line()
let line2 = read_one_line()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect_dedup(a, b)
let sorted_inter = sort_asc(inter)

if sorted_inter.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted_inter
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
